features.name: struct literal with type prefix
features.description: Code should include a structure literal with the type name specified before the apostrophe operator, such as struct_type'{ field: value }
features.snippet:
typedef struct { logic [7:0] field1; logic [15:0] field2; } my_struct_t;
my_struct_t s = my_struct_t'{ field1: 8'h00, field2: 16'h1234 };
